decisions.dep_deviation: crepes は core から外し crosscheck(test-only) extra に格下げ。core は numpy/scipy/pydantic のみ(foldgauge 流 GPU-free)。Mondrian は native numpy 実装、crepes は独立 cross-check 専用。pandas 不採用(driftset binning は numpy digitize で再実装)
decisions.frame: passive harness core + 薄いcurate()糖衣 (A2 frame pivot は critic 却下)
decisions.moat: conformal較正 × URDF物理 hard-gate × abstention (競合は全て CV/motion heuristic)

conformal.success_coverage: 実ラベルbenchmarkのみ(循環回避)

OQ1.note: score_lerobot_episodes=CV heuristic+optional Gemini VLM, 5-dim quality. NOT conformal/URDF/physics-gate. differentiation line holds

OQ2.note: no OSS bundles LeRobot-native conformal validity + URDF physics gate + abstention. academic papers exist (CAP/dual-threshold) but no harness OSS

OQ3.note: LIVE confirmed: robot_descriptions panda_description(9 limited joints, panda_joint1 [-2.8973,2.8973] vel 2.175) + iiwa14_description(7 joints) load via yourdfpy. UR5e/xArm7 lack bare URDF_PATH (MJCF/xacro)→DegradedContext or user-supplied URDF. 2/4 direct + rest degrade = CLAIM holds (Panda canonical)

OQ4.note: LeRobotDataset v3 = parquet+mp4 on HF Hub, action/state columns readable GPU-free via pyarrow. S6b real-mode possible

OQ5_license.note: test fixtures = self-authored minimal synthetic URDFs (no manufacturer redistribution). real runs fetch via robot_descriptions on demand. NOTICE records sources

KC_urdf_coverage.note: SO-101/Koch/LeKiwi >50% of ~16k datasets (no URDF→degrade first-class). xArm/Franka/KUKA iiwa fewer datasets but largest episode counts (pro labs)=highest-value physics-gate targets. NOT 極端に空→scope=industrial-arm dataset audit, explicit

KC_curation_redundancy.note: curate() differentiates via internal conformal+physics engine, not CV/motion heuristic. orthogonal to democlean/any4lerobot/score_lerobot_episodes

next_action: S1 schema: EpisodeRecord/EmbodimentSpec/JointLimits/StepValidity/ValidityReport/CoverageReport(source=measured)/EpisodeVerdict/DatasetReport. pydantic extra=forbid. then tests/unit/test_schema.py
